unlock_reasoning: MS-010 is unlocked because the two primary transition research surfaces now link to the milestone ledger, development status, release snapshot, and release index. A reader can reach the public verification surfaces from the main research pages without knowing direct URLs.
not_claimed: This is not a claim that all transitions are 5/5 Receipt-backed.
This is not a claim of unbounded autonomy.
This is not a final publication release.
This is a named development snapshot of the current experimental table state with public navigation integrated.
